raw_title: What Makes for a Good News Experience: Developing a UX Perspective to Advance Audience Studies in Journalism
title_en: What Makes for a Good News Experience: Developing a UX Perspective to Advance Audience Studies in Journalism
title_zh: 什么造就了良好的新闻体验：发展用户体验视角以推进新闻学中的受众研究
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了如何通过用户体验（UX）的视角来研究新闻消费，旨在帮助理解什么因素能让人们觉得新闻体验好，从而改进新闻研究和实践。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to study news consumption from a user experience (UX) perspective, aiming to understand what makes a good news experience and improve journalism research and practice.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻学中受众体验的优化，通过整合用户体验理论来深化对新闻消费行为的理解，推动新闻媒体的创新和发展。
research_direction_en: Optimizing audience experience in journalism by integrating UX theory to deepen understanding of news consumption behavior and drive innovation in news media.
